title: Career Opportunity Teacher at StudyIQ Education

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at StudyIQ Education
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About StudyIQ Education:
StudyIQ Education is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education!
